pi_items.source: Domain verification via web search and GitHub Docs, Stack Overflow Cookie Policy; confirmed in setup_task.sh (lines 32-33) and verifier.py (lines 33-34, 36-38)
Google Cookies documentation (policies.google.com); verified in task.json description (line 4) and verifier.py (lines 35, 62-64)

pi_items.verified_value: Network/Cookies (for Edge 131; older versions use just 'Cookies')
pi_items.source: Microsoft Learn documentation on Edge cookie storage; Chromium v96+ and Edge v98+ use Network/Cookies path. Edge 131 (installed via install_edge.sh line 48) uses this modern path structure.
Task description, all scripts reference microsoft-edge binary; install_edge.sh (line 44-45) installs microsoft-edge-stable

pi_items.verified_value: SQLite database with Cookies table, host_key field for domain filtering
pi_items.source: Chromium source documentation (chromium.googlesource.com); verified in setup_task.sh (lines 54-56) and export_result.sh (lines 36-38) using sqlite3 queries

privileged_info_summary: The task requires selective cookie clearing in Microsoft Edge for GitHub and Stack Overflow domains while preserving Google session data. The three target domains (github.com, stackoverflow.com, google.com) are verified as real, publicly-accessible websites with documented cookie usage. Microsoft Edge version 131.0.2903.99 stores cookies in a SQLite database at ~/.config/microsoft-edge/Default/Network/Cookies (the standard path for Chromium v96+ and Edge v98+). The verifier checks cookie counts using SQL LIKE queries on the host_key field to confirm selective deletion occurred without affecting the preserved domain.
